description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Hugo Docker image registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:0.92.2 and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a pages job (default deploy stage) that runs the command hugo, saves the generated public directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch to publish the site via GitLab Pages. Add a test job (default test stage) that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch. No services, caches, or additional artifacts are required.
